== Notes for [[Item:Q105826|Q105826]] ==

From ''Banu Kinda'' Tribe.

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

She is detailed in books by '''Sayyidna Ali bin Sulaiman Al-Hindi''' & '''Sayyidna Qazi un-Nu'maan'''.

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rubab_bint_Imra_al-Qais

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014644273519

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
